scene_input.scene_summary: The Khawlān Delegation arrives in Madinah, led by their leader.
scene_input.key_visual_action: Leader of Khawlān Delegation dismounts from camel

schema_output.scene_title: The Khawlān Delegation Arrives in Madinah
schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 367
schema_output.moral_lesson: Welcoming guests and dignitaries with respect and honor

characters.name: Leader of Khawlān Delegation
characters.appearance: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe and a deep brown woolen cloak with a white cloth head covering, riding a camel

characters.name: Prophet Muhammad
characters.appearance: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a distinctive deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades

schema_output.narrative_text: The Khawlān Delegation arrived in Madinah, led by their respected leader. The Prophet Muhammad welcomed them with honor and respect.

compliance.notes: Historical accuracy and respect for dignitaries

schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. Exterior of the Madinah City Gate, with the city's mud-brick walls and packed-earth road in the background. Late afternoon sunlight casts warm rays across the scene. In the foreground, a camel stands still, its rider, the leader of the Khawlān Delegation, seen entirely from behind: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe and a deep brown woolen cloak with a white cloth head covering. The rider extends a hand to dismount, while the camel's reins lie on the ground. Standing on the right, the central figure: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a distinctive deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades, gazing at the delegation with a respectful expression. Warm sand, beige, and golden palette with the deep green cloak as a color anchor. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
_safety_changes: 'the man in the green cloak' -> 'the central figure'
